chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1797 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.7771/2023 (Stay App) 2. For hearing of main case 10.01.2024 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector/IO Ghulam Sarwar Solangi and ASI Hakim Ali of Police Station Kandiaro..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- IO submits that he has investigated the matter and recorded the statements of complainant and witnesses, who have not supported the case against the petitioner, and therefore, he has let off the petitioner and would not challan him in this case. On the basis of such statement, learned Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition, which, in the light of the statement made by the IO, is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
